title: lobelia chinensis f. lactiflora
intro: Lobelia chinensis f. lactiflora, also known as the Chinese lobelia or white-petaled lobelia, is a flowering plant native to China, known for its unique white-petaled flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia chinensis f. lactiflora include reducing inflammation, improving lung function, and providing antioxidant effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory and immune system support. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
